scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @dc2d/game-server" "npm run dev -w @dc2d/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @dc2d/client && npm run build -w @dc2d/game-server
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/engine && tsc --noEmit -p packages/game-server && tsc --noEmit -p packages/client
